zh.lifeSummary: Rachel Atkinson是Lt John Bean的女兒，於大約1760年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡羅來納州。她於大約1780年與Vardry Magby II結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1840年之前在美國阿拉巴馬州沃克。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Rachel Atkinson是Lt John Bean的女儿，于大约1760年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡罗来纳州。她于大约1780年与Vardry Magby II结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1840年之前在美国亚拉巴马州沃克。

nameMeanings.name: Atkinson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): patronymic from the personal name Atkin or Adkin, pet forms of Adam.

variants.name: Aitchison
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of   Atkinson   (see also   Atchison  ).

variants.name: Atkin
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Atkin (composed of Ade + the diminutive suffix -kin). This is one of the many medieval pet forms of Adam . Compare Scottish Aitken .

variants.name: Adkinson
meanings: English (northern): from the Middle English personal name Adkin + son. Compare Atkinson .

variants.name: Atchison
meanings: Scottish, English, and northern Irish: palatalized form of northern English   Atkinson  .

nameMeanings.name: Rachel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘ewe’ in Hebrew), borne by the beloved wife of Jacob and mother (after long barrenness) of Joseph (Genesis 28–35) and of Benjamin, at whose birth she died. In the Middle Ages and subsequently this was regarded as a characteristically Jewish name, but it is now also popular among Gentiles.

variants.name: Rachelle
meanings: Elaborated form of   Rachel  , as if from French, but actually a recent coinage in English.

historicEvents.title: Tryon Palace
historicEvents.description: Built on August 26, 1767, the Tryon Palace became the capitol building for North Carolina. The building was named after William Tryon a British officer and colonial official.
Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: The First Constitution
historicEvents.description: Serving the newly created United States of America as the first constitution, the Articles of Confederation were an agreement among the 13 original states preserving the independence and sovereignty of the states. But with a limited central government, the Constitutional Convention came together to replace the Articles of Confederation with a more established Constitution and central government on where the states can be represented and voice their concerns and comments to build up the nation.

historicEvents.title: A Free America
historicEvents.description: The Revolutionary War ended with the signing of the Treaty of Paris which gave the new nation boundries on which they could expand and trade with other countries without any problems.
France sells Louisiana territories to U.S.A.

historicEvents.title: Alabama Becomes a State
historicEvents.description: Alabama became the twenty-second state admitted to the Union on December 14, 1819.

historicEvents.title: Financial Relief for Public Land
historicEvents.description: A United States law to provide financial relief for the purchasers of Public Lands. It permitted the earlier buyers, that couldn't pay completely for the land, to return the land back to the government. This granted them a credit towards the debt they had on land. Congress, also, extended credit to buyer for eight more years. Still while being in economic panic and the shortage of currency made by citizens, the government hoped that with the time extension, the economy would improve.
Historical Boundaries: 1823: Walker, Alabama, United States

en.lifeSummary: Rachel Atkinson was born about 1760, in North Carolina, British Colonial America as the daughter of Lt John Bean. She married Vardry Magby II about 1780. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died before 1840, in Walker, Alabama, United States.

fr.North Carolina, British Colonial America: Caroline du Nord, Amérique coloniale britannique
fr.lifeSummary: Rachel Atkinson est née environ 1760, à Caroline du Nord, Amérique coloniale britannique, fille de Lt John Bean. Elle a épousé Vardry Magby II environ 1780. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée avant 1840, à Walker, Alabama, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Rachel Atkinson wurde um 1760 in North Carolina, British Colonial America, als Tochter von Lt John Bean geboren. Sie hat um 1780 Vardry Magby II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb vor 1840 in Walker, Alabama, Vereinigte Staaten.

ja.lifeSummary: Rachel Atkinsonは約1760年にイギリス植民地アメリカノースカロライナ州でLt John Beanの娘として生まれた。約1780年にVardry Magby IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1840年以前にアメリカ合衆国アラバマ州ウォーカーで死去した。

ko.Halifax, Virginia, British Colonial Amer: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 할이파스
ko.lifeSummary: Rachel Atkinson(은)는 대략 1760년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 노스캐롤라이나 주에서 Lt John Bean의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1780년 Vardry Magby II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1840년 이전 미국 앨라배마 주 워커에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Rachel Atkinson родилась около 1760 г. в местности Северная Каролина, бритиш колоняль амирика. Её отца звали Lt John Bean. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Vardry Magby II около 1780 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла перед 1840 г. в местности валкир, Алабама, Соединенные штаты.
